content:
These are the characters that I have so far. I was able to finish up to chapter 4 normal mode with 2 teams which i was experimenting (Thais, Helot:Catena, Hameln, Tawil) and (Saya, Jenkin, Aigis, Winkle)  - feel free me to adjust or correct me with these team build

With the characters I have is there any other teams I could use to try out (appreciate it if you could list more than 1 so i can try out different teams and experiment). I am still relatively new so i'm not so sure about team synergy/dynamics. Let me know if the Chaos and Aequor team can be improved or if i can pair with others.

Also I am able to redeem characters that I don't have, personally I tried some characters that I like. Here are my options (only able to redeem 1) - Mouchette, Murphy: Fauxborn, Castor, 24. Any thoughts? Though personally I really like Mouchette. Feel free to input your answers~ Thanks!

Hey there : )

Mouchette is great if your need quick damage, Castor provides sustainability.
I didn't play 24 or Murphy : Fauxborne yet but you can give them a whirl in the free trials.
I would replace Aurita with Myriam but that's mostly a personnal preference. She can provide some shield, though, once you up her rouse. Also helps trigger Murphy's exalt with the "chosen one" command.
Also, I suggest you try Thaïs-Saya-Aurita-Murphy/Myriam

Hiii thank you very much for the recommendation~ just wanted to ask are there any ultra teams that I can use aside from jenkin and winkle since i pretty much know their kit it could be a full or mix team of ultra~

Try get Arachne for Ultra.

Her change to the ultra realm is a powerful support for many.

Agreed.

If you're out of "pick your fav" you could try to add Clemy and Horla.
They both provide limited sustain and could replace Winkle.
For damage, Tinct could be fun to try as well and decreases other commands' costs.
Cassiah seems to work great with Mouchette if you don't care about the ultra round.
Finally, Liz is pretty much a " Feed me 'till I burst " kind of awakener, able to hasten her own exalt if you don't have enough arithmetica to play her commands.
On a side note : Once you tried them and figured their limitations, do read what getting their shards would change.

Hey so I just started a few hours ago, I just finished chapter two and I've been enjoying the story alot, so I started wondering which of these characters I should start investing and working on building their teams up with, any and all advice would be greatly appreciated

The basic of tentacle team
Caecus/Doll  + Tulu +  Murphy +  Aurita/Sanga

Counter team: 
Caecus + Nautilla can form a counter team together.

Beginner Strike team:
Helot + Lotan + Aegis + AnyWarden

Aurita Corrosion:
Aurita + Saya + Sanga + FreeSlot(preferrably character that can debuff like Murphy)

Tulu Corrosion:
Tulu + Saya + Aurita + Murphy

==============
Generally, you want most character at level 60, skill level 3.
They are going to be relevant for gamemode that require multiple teams.

=
If any to think twice before comitting, from what I heard:
Uvhash (Require high investment)
Poison team (Later content require Lily to survive. Xu & GDoll makes them good to play. Without said character the team struggles once the foes getting tougher)
Gotcha thank so much

I just started about 30 days ago, and currently I'm in chapter 8.

So the problem is, reading chapter 7 and 8, I feel like I'm missing things I need to know.
And with reality verge being limited to one daily, I need to prioritize story that ties to the main story.

Need help in this matter.

Basically, you can start by reviewing the lore chapters of characters as they appear in the story.
Like Ogier, Aigis, Sanga, Daffodil, Lily.

I believe they are sorted in reading order but I didn't go further than chapter 4 to farm and build my team so my advice has limited value ^^'

If it takes too long to get an answer, you may want to ask again in https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1433513650299076780

My suggested teams are:
W1: Saya Helot Ogier Mouchette  (Whale borrow) (A5)
W2: Tawil Caecus Hameln Nautila (A4-A5) 
W3: Aurita Vortice Sanga Corpo (A5)
W4: Ghelot Aigis Thais Horla (A5)
W5: Miryam Tulu Goliath GMurphy (A5)

Should be able to get 395-400 points with this
W2 you could probably make a second team if you do A4 with Pollux Castor Arachne Winkle(filler) if you can't do A5 with your tawil team
Thanks lol
+codes

I started playing some days ago, got the 250 pulls from the collab event then my gambling addiction kicked in and i pulled on moonless guide for abit which got me tawil , hameln e2 and horla e2. Now i am left with 100 pulls and no idea what to do, any thoughts? (also i hear the pulls turn to standard in some time idk what thats about)

The two bottom banners are permanent ones and only allow you to pull standard awakeners and WoDs ( which doesn't mean they're bad, just not time-limited ) with a few extra tossed in.
These two are the only banners you can pull with your cores when they expire.

If you haven't pulled Saya yet, I suggest you go for her since her mechanic is rather distinct for caro, along with at least 1 copy of her window of destiny.

Any remaining cores you may want to use on Clementine ( I'm a fan of Murphy myself, but you seem to lean more towards chaos-ultra ).
alright thanks for the advice, much love twin
